title: First Frame Agent
tagline: Turn rough product notes into a 9:16 first frame, motion prompt, caption beats, and QA checklist.
description: A narrow bring-your-own-key agent demo for creators and product marketers who need a strong opening frame before sending a prompt into image-to-video tools.
features: Converts a messy product, service, or creator note into one decisive vertical first-frame direction.
Packages the output as an opening frame recipe, image prompt, motion prompt, caption beats, negative prompt, and QA checklist.
Uses the visitor's selected provider key per request, with OpenAI models able to render the frame through the hosted image generation tool.

quick_start.title: Use your key
quick_start.code:
open http://localhost:3000
# Paste your own OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google AI key in the app

architecture: Next.js renders a one-page frame-building workflow with provider selection and a BYOK key gate.
The browser keeps the visitor key in session storage and sends it only to the same-origin /api/run route as x-provider-key.
The route builds the selected provider client from that request key, streams the director board, and exposes image generation only when the selected OpenAI model supports it.
No author-owned inference key is stored, logged, proxied as fallback, or required for runtime use.
configuration: No server API key is required for local use.
Visitors bring their own OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google AI key.
OpenAI image-capable models can render the first-frame concept image; text-only providers return the structured slate.
distribution: Launch as a public dvnc-labs BYOK demo after GitHub Actions passes.
Share with image-to-video, UGC, product marketing, and creator workflow communities.
Use the generated assets/og.png as the GitHub social preview.
